findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "list_webhooks" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: List all webhook endpoints registered for the authenticated account. Secrets are never returned by this tool.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "rotate_webhook_secret" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Mint a new HMAC-SHA256 signing secret for a registered webhook endpoint. The previous secret is invalidated immediately - integrators must update their receiver…

name: cancel_compel
description: Cancel an in-progress compel. Dequeues it if still queued, otherwise cancels any active external (AI provider) tasks and transitions it to CANCELLED. Idempotent - cancelling an already-CANCELLED compel succeeds. Use to stop a mis-prompted or runaway job before it consumes more render minutes.

description.name: get_account_credits
description.description: Get the authenticated account's render-minute balance and plan: minutes remaining (free + paid), monthly allowance, plan code, and whether the quota is exceeded. Call before starting an expensive render so an agent can make cost-aware decisions.

description.name: list_lighting_effects
description.description: List the COM-497 starter lighting effects available to launch as cues (e.g. "gobo-cycle", "x-move", "dimmer-pulse"). Each effect carries an id, the capabilities it needs, and a launch_contract template. Use the returned id as effect_id for launch_lighting_cue.

description.name: launch_lighting_cue
description.description: Launch a starter lighting effect onto a stage as a live cue (e.g. "gobo-cycle on the stage's 7R beams at speed 0.5"). Pass effect_id (from list_lighting_effects) and optional variables to override effect defaults. Validation is loud: an unknown effect, a launch_contract whose bindings a stage cannot

description.name: list_lighting_cues
description.description: List the live (non-stopped) lighting cues REACT is executing, including each cue's launch_id, resolved variables, launch_contract, and feedback. Optionally scope to one stage.

description.name: get_lighting_cue
description.description: Fetch a single live lighting cue by its launch_id, including resolved variables, launch_contract, and REACT feedback.

description.name: stop_lighting_cue
description.description: Stop a live cue by its launch_id. Idempotent - the cue is marked stop-requested so REACT drops it on its next refresh.

description.name: set_lighting_cue_variables
description.description: Update variables on a live cue (e.g. change cycle speed or intensity mid-show). Only the variables you pass change; the rest keep their current values. Stopped cues are rejected.

description.name: ack_lighting_cue
description.description: REACT/BAE acknowledgement for a launch_id. Idempotently records whether the executor accepted or rejected the cue and which executor observed it.

description.name: report_lighting_cue
description.description: REACT/BAE report-back for cue status, active variables, skipped bindings, capability misses, last_frame_at, and errors.

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "register_webhook" stacks urgency/override words (immediately, never). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: upload_media, register_webhook, test_webhook_delivery · Private data: upload_media, search_music, create_compel_from_music, search_media, register_webhook, list_webhooks, update_webhook, rotate_webhook_secret, ack_lighting_cue · Public sink: upload_media, create_compel_from_music, register_webhook, list_webhooks, delete_webhook, test_webhook_delivery, update_webhook, rotate_webhook_secret · Destructive: delete_webhook.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: upload_media, register_webhook, test_webhook_delivery · Private data: upload_media, search_music, create_compel_from_music, search_media, register_webhook, list_webhooks, update_webhook, rotate_webhook_secret, ack_lighting_cue · Public sink: upload_media, create_compel_from_music, register_webhook, list_webhooks, delete_webhook, test_webhook_delivery, update_webhook, rotate_webhook_secret · Destructive: delete_webhook

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
